Name: Adaptability
Description: Increases the Same Type Attack Bonus from *1.5 to *2.

Name: Aerilate
Description: Increases the power of Normal-type moves by 20%. It then changes those moves to Flying-type.

Name: Aftermath
Description: The foe that dealt the final hit loses 1/4 of its maximum HP if the move made physical contact.

Name: Analytic
Description: Attack power increases by 30% if the Pokémon is the last Pokémon to attack this turn

Name: Anger Point
Description: Increases Attack to maximum level upon taking a critical hit.

Name: Anticipation
Description: Warns when the foe knows 1-hit KO or super-effective moves.

Name: Armor Tail
Description: The mysterious tail covering the Pokémon's head makes opponents unable to use priority moves against the Pokémon or its allies.

Name: Aroma Veil
Description: Protects itself and its allies from attacks that limit their move choices.

Name: Berserk
Description: Boosts the Pokémon's Sp. Atk stat when it takes a  hit that causes its HP to become half or less.

Name: Big Pecks
Description: Protects the Pokémon from Defense-lowering effects.

Name: Blaze
Description: When HP is below 1/3rd its maximum, power of Fire-type moves is increased by 50%.

Name: Bulletproof
Description: Protects the Pokémon from some ball and bomb moves.

Name: Cheek Pouch
Description: Restores HP as well when the Pokémon eats a Berry.

Name: Chlorophyll
Description: When sunny, the Pokémon’s Speed doubles.

Name: Clear Body
Description: Opponents’ moves which lower this Pokémon’s stats have no effect. However this Pokémon may lower its own stats with its own moves.

Name: Cloud Nine
Description: All weather effects are negated while the Pokémon is on the field.

Name: Competitive
Description: Raises Sp. Atk stat by two stages whenever a stat is lowered

Name: Compoundeyes
Description: Raises the Pokémon’s accuracy by 30%. Overworld Effect: If the Pokémon is in the lead spot, chance of encountering a wild Pokémon holding an item increases from 50% to 60% or 5% to 20%.

Name: Contrary
Description: Moves used on the Pokémon that raise stats lower the stats, while the moves that lower the stats raise the stat

Name: Corrosion
Description: The Pokémon can poison the target even if it's a Steel or Poison type.

Name: Cud Chew
Description: When the Pokémon eats a Berry, it will regurgitate that Berry at the end of the next turn and eat it one more time.

Name: Curious Medicine
Description: When the Pokémon  is brought into battle, any stat alterations of allies are removed Own Tempo : The Pokémon cannot be Confused while having this ability. Blocks Intimidate : Regenerator : When the Pokémon switches out of battle, up to 33.3% of its maximum Hit Points are restored

Name: Cursed Body
Description: When a move hits the Pokémon, that move has a 30% chance of getting disabled

Name: Cute Charm
Description: The opponent has a 30% chance of being induced with Attract when using an attack, that requires physical contact, against this Pokémon. Overworld Effect: If the Pokémon is in the lead spot, chance of encountering a wild Pokémon of the opposite gender will be 66.6%. Does not effect swarming Pokémon. . This doesn't work in Pokémon Scarlet & Violet onwards

Name: Damp
Description: Explosion, Selfdestruct, Mind Blown & Misty Explosion will not work while the Pokémon is on the field.

Name: Defiant
Description: Attack is raised by two stages when the Pokémon has its stats lowered. Doesn't work on self inflicted stat drops or drops from allies

Name: Disguise
Description: Once per battle, the Pokémon can withstand one damaging attack without receiving any damage. Damage inflicted through entry hazards, weather or status conditions will not break the disguise. Damage from Confusion will break the Disguise. It causes 1/8th of max Hit Point damage when it breaks

Name: Dragonize
Description: The Pokémon's Normal-type moves become Dragon-type moves and their power is boosted by 20%.

Name: Drizzle
Description: Weather changes to Heavy Rain when the Pokémon enters the battle. As of X & Y, this lasts 5 turns.

Name: Drought
Description: Weather changes to Intense Sunshine when the Pokémon enters the battle. As of X & Y, this lasts 5 turns.

Name: Dry Skin
Description: HP is restored when hit by Water-type moves or when it is raining but also makes the Pokémon weak to Fire-type moves and reduces HP during strong sunlight.

Name: Early Bird
Description: Sleep conditions lasts for half as long, rounding down. For example, half of three turns is 1.5, which rounds down to one turn. When the number of turns to sleep is one, half of this rounded down is zero, and the Pokémon wakes up instantly.

Name: Earth Eater
Description: The user recovers 25% of its maximum Hit Points when a Ground-type move is used against it

Name: Electromorphosis
Description: The Pokémon becomes charged when it takes damage, boosting the power of the next Electric-type move the Pokémon uses.

Name: Fairy Aura
Description: Powers up every Pokémon in play's Fairy-type moves by 33%

Name: Filter
Description: Damage by super-effective moves is reduced by 25%.

Name: Flame Body
Description: The opponent has a 30% chance of being induced with Burn when using an attack, that requires physical contact, against this Pokémon. Overworld Effect: Eggs hatch quicker (half the number of steps are required).

Name: Flash Fire
Description: Activates when user is hit by a damaging Fire-type move (including Fire-type Hidden Power). Once activated, user’s Fire-type moves deal 1.5 times damage. While this ability is in effect, this Pokémon is immune to damage from Fire-type attacks and Fire-type Hidden Power (accuracy and effect from these moves are ignored). For Fire-type Pokémon with this ability, Will-O-Wisp activates this ability without having an effect. Overworld Effect: If the Pokémon is in the lead spot, chance of encountering a Fire-type wild Pokémon increases severely. . This doesn't work in Pokémon Scarlet & Violet onwards

Name: Flower Veil
Description: Ally Grass-type Pokémon are protected from status conditions and the lowering of their stats.

Name: Forecast
Description: This Pokémon’ changes its form and type if Harsh Sunlight, Heavy Rain or Snow is in effect.

Name: Friend Guard
Description: In Double battles, the damage that ally Pokémon receive from attacks is reduced by 25%.

Name: Frisk
Description: Reveals the foe’s held item.

Name: Fur Coat
Description: Halves the damage from physical moves onto this Pokémon.

Name: Gale Wings
Description: All Flying-type moves have their Speed Priority increased by 1 if the Pokémon's Hit Points are at maximum

Name: Gluttony
Description: The Pokémon will use a berry when its Hit Points are below 50%.

Name: Gooey
Description: Lowers the opponent's Speed by one stage when it makes physical contact.

Name: Guts
Description: Attack is increased by 50% when induced with a status (BURN, PARALYZE, SLEEP, POISON, FREEZE). Burn’s effect of lowering Attack is not applied.

Name: Harvest
Description: The Pokémon has a 50% chance of restoring a consumed berry. During sunshine, this chance increases to 100% Overworld Effect: If the Pokémon is in the lead spot, chance of encountering a Grass-type wild Pokémon increases severely.. This doesn't work in Pokémon Scarlet & Violet onwards

Name: Healer
Description: At the end of the turn, there is a 30% chance of either Ally being healed from a status condition

Name: Heatproof
Description: Damage from Fire-type moves and the Burn status is halved.

Name: Heavy Metal
Description: Doubles the Pokémon's weight.

Name: Hospitality
Description: Heals up to 25% of its partner Pokémon's Maximum Hit Points when it enters battle

Name: Huge Power
Description: The Pokémon's Attack stat is doubled while it has this ability.

Name: Hunger Switch
Description: The Pokémon changes its form, alternating between its Full Belly Mode and Hangry Mode after the end of each turn.

Name: Hustle
Description: Damage from physical attacks is increased by 50%, but average accuracy is only 80%. Overworld Effect: If the Pokémon is in the lead spot, chance of encountering a high level wild Pokémon increases by 50%.. This does not work in Pokémon Sword & Shield onwards

Name: Hydration
Description: All status problems: Burn, Paralysis, Sleep, Frozen and Poison, are healed when raining.

Name: Hyper Cutter
Description: Opponent cannot lower this Pokémon’s Attack value. This Pokémon may still lower its own Attack value using a move of by itself.

Name: Ice Body
Description: HP is restored by 1/16th of maximum HP when its Snowing.

Name: Illuminate
Description: By Iluminating its surroundings, the Pokémon prevents its accuracy from being lowered Overworld Effect: If the Pokémon is in the lead spot, chance of encountering a wild Pokémon increases to 200%. In Pokémon Sword & Shield, this only works on Random encounters. This doesn't work in Pokémon Scarlet & Violet onwards

Name: Illusion
Description: When sent out into battle, it takes the name and appearance of the last non-fainted Pokémon within your party. It breaks when an attack does damage on the Pokémon but not from Weather Effects or Entry Hazards.

Name: Immunity
Description: The Pokémon cannot be Poisoned while having this ability.

Name: Imposter
Description: When sent into battle, the Pokémon automatically transforms into a random opponent that is on the field.

Name: Infiltrator
Description: The protections and stat boosts caused by the moves Substitute, Reflect, Light Screen and Safeguard by the opponent are ignored. Overworld Effect: If the Pokémon is in the lead spot, chance of encountering a wild Pokémon decreases to 50%. In Pokémon Sword & Shield this reduces to 12.5%. This doesn't work in Pokémon Scarlet & Violet onwards

Name: Innards Out
Description: Damages the attacker landing the finishing hit by the amount equal to its last HP.

Name: Inner Focus
Description: This Pokémon will not flinch. Does not prevent flinching with Focus Punch. Also prevents stats from being lowered by the ability Intimidate

Name: Insomnia
Description: The Pokémon cannot be put to Sleep while having this ability.

Name: Intimidate
Description: Upon entering battle or receiving the ability, the opponent’s Attack lowers one stage. In a Double Battle, both opponents’ Attack are lowered. Pokémon with the Clear Body, Hyper Cutter, or White Smoke ability are unaffected. In a link battle, if both sides switch on the same turn, and first player sends out a Pokémon with Intimidate, the opponent’s Attack will be lowered before the opponent’s Pokémon switches. Overworld Effect: If the Pokémon is in the lead spot, chance of encountering a low level wild Pokémon decreases by 50%. This applies to Pokémon five levels lower than or below the level of the lead Pokémon. This doesn't workf rom Pokémon Sword & Shield onwards

Name: Iron Fist
Description: The power of punching moves is increased by 20%. This stacks with Punching Glove .

Name: Justified
Description: Attack is raised by one stage when the Pokémon is hit by a Dark-type move

Name: Keen Eye
Description: Opponent cannot lower this Pokémon’s accuracy. The Pokémon ignores evasion boosts of the opponent Overworld Effect: If the Pokémon is in the lead spot, chance of encountering a low level wild Pokémon decreases by 50%. This applies to Pokémon five levels lower than or below the level of the lead Pokémon.

Name: Klutz
Description: The Pokémon cannot receive any effect of hold items except those that affect experience, EVs, friendship etc. such as Amulet Coin, Soothe Bell, Lucky Egg, Exp.Share, Macho Brace or the Power Items.

Name: Leaf Guard
Description: Prevents the Pokémon from being afflicted by status conditions during strong sunlight.

Name: Levitate
Description: Damage dealing Ground-type moves have no effect on this Pokémon. Cannot be trapped by Arena Trap ability. Takes no damage from Spikes.

Name: Light Metal
Description: Halves the Pokémon's weight.

Name: Lightning Rod
Description: Electric-type moves are drawn to this Pokémon. Electric-type moves will do no damage and the Pokémon's SP ATK is raised one stage. Overworld Effect: If the Pokémon is in the lead spot, chance of encountering an Electric-type wild Pokémon increases severely. This doesn't work in Pokémon Scarlet & Violet onwards

Name: Limber
Description: The Pokémon cannot be Paralysed while having this ability.

Name: Liquid Voice
Description: All sound-based moves become Water-type moves.

Name: Magic Bounce
Description: Reflects non-attacking moves used on the Pokémon back to the attacking Pokémon

Name: Magic Guard
Description: Prevents all no damage except from direct-attack moves, excluding damage self inflicted from Substitute, Belly Drum, Curse & Pain Split.

Name: Magician
Description: The Pokémon steals the held item of a Pokémon it hits with a move.

Name: Magma Armor
Description: This Pokémon cannot be Frozen while having this ability. Overworld Effect: Eggs hatch quicker (half the number of steps are required).

Name: Marvel Scale
Description: Defense is increased by 50% when induced with a status (BURN, PARALYZE, SLEEP, POISON, FREEZE).

Name: Mega Launcher
Description: Increases the power of Aura and Pulse moves by 50%

Name: Mega Sol
Description: Even when the sunlight has not turned harsh, the Pokémon can use its moves as if the weather were harsh sunlight.

Name: Merciless
Description: The Pokémon's attacks become critical hits if the target is poisoned.

Name: Mimicry
Description: Changes to Electric-type in Electric Terrain, Psychic-type in Psychic Terrain, Grass-type in Grassy Terrain and Fairy type in Fairy-terrain. The type reverts to normal when the terrain ends.

Name: Minus
Description: When battling with Plus or Minus, Special Attack increases by 50%.

Name: Mirror Armor
Description: Bounces back only the stat-lowering effects that the Pokémon receives.

Name: Mold Breaker
Description: The Pokémon's moves are not affected by foe’s abilities during battle

Name: Moody
Description: At the end of every turn, a random stat (except Accuracy and Evasion) is raised by two stages while another is lowered by one stage.

Name: Motor Drive
Description: The Pokémon takes no damage from Electric-type attacks and Speed raises by one level.

Name: Moxie
Description: Attack is raised by one stage when the Pokémon knocks out another Pokémon

Name: Multiscale
Description: Reduces damage afflicted to the Pokémon by 50% if at maximum HP

Name: Mummy
Description: Contact with the Pokémon changes the attacker's Ability to Mummy.

Name: Natural Cure
Description: The Pokémon’s status (BURN, PARALYZE, SLEEP, POISON, FREEZE) is healed when withdrawn from battle.

Name: No Guard
Description: The accuracy of all moves known by this Pokémon and all Pokémon targeting this Pokémon raises to 100% Overworld Effect: If the Pokémon is in the lead spot, chance of encountering a wild Pokémon increases by 100%. This doesn't work in Pokémon Scarlet & Violet onwards

Name: Oblivious
Description: The Pokémon cannot be under the Attract condition, Intimidated, or be taunted, while having this ability.

Name: Opportunist
Description: If an opponent's stat is boosted, the Pokémon seizes the opportunity to boost the same stat for itself.

Name: Overcoat
Description: Protects Pokémon from Weather Effects and Powder moves such as Sleep Powder, Poison Powder etc.

Name: Overgrow
Description: When HP is below 1/3rd its maximum, power of Grass-type moves is increased by 50%.

Name: Own Tempo
Description: The Pokémon cannot be Confused while having this ability. Blocks Intimidate

Name: Parental Bond
Description: Every move used by the Pokémon will hit twice. The damage inflicted by the second hit is reduced to 25%. If the move used is a damaging move, each hit is capable of afflicting Secondary Effects and Critical Hits

Name: Pickpocket
Description: When a Pokémon makes physical contact with the Pokémon, the item of the opponent is stolen.

Name: Pickup
Description: Has a 10% chance of finding and holding an item after battle. Will not work if this Pokémon is already holding an item. From Black & White, it allows for the user to pick up the item of its opponent or ally if they used up the item in battle.

Name: Piercing Drill
Description: When the Pokémon uses contact moves, it can hit even targets that are protecting themselves, dealing 1/4 of the damage that the move would otherwise deal. Everything aside from the target's protective effects is still triggered.

Name: Pixilate
Description: Increases the power of Normal-type moves by 20%. It then changes those moves to Fairy-type.

Name: Plus
Description: When battling with Plus or Minus, Special Attack increases by 50%.

Name: Poison Heal
Description: HP is restored by 1/8th the maximum HP every turn while the Pokémon has the Poison condition.

Name: Poison Point
Description: The opponent has a 30% chance of being induced with Poison when using an attack, that requires physical contact, against this Pokémon.

Name: Poison Touch
Description: When the Pokémon attacks its opponents with a move that causes Physical Contact, there is a 30% chance that the target is Poisoned.

Name: Prankster
Description: Status category moves have their Speed Priority increased by 1. Moves increased by this that are used on Dark-type opponents will fail.

Name: Pressure
Description: When this Pokémon is hit by a move, the opponent’s PP lowers by 2 rather than 1. Overworld Effect: If the Pokémon is in the lead spot, chance of encountering a high level wild Pokémon increases by 50%.

Name: Protean
Description: Before the Pokémon uses a move, it becomes a pure Pokémon of that type. This only works once per switch in.

Name: Pure Power
Description: The Pokémon’s Attack stat is doubled in battle while having this ability.

Name: Purifying Salt
Description: The Pokémon's pure salt protects it from status conditions and halves the damage taken from Ghost-type moves.

Name: Queenly Majesty
Description: Prevents the opponent from using moves with increased Speed Priority on this Pokémon or its allies.

Name: Quick Draw
Description: At the start of each turn, this Pokémon has a 30% chance of moving first in the Speed Priority Bracket

Name: Quick Feet
Description: Speed is increased by 50% when induced with a status (Burn, Poison, Sleep, Frozen & Paralysis). If Paralysed, the speed drop is ignored. Overworld Effect: If the Pokémon is in the lead spot, chance of encountering a wild Pokémon decreases to 50%. In Pokémon Sword & Shield this reduces to 12.5%. This doesn't work in Pokémon Scarlet & Violet onwards

Name: Rain Dish
Description: If Heavy Rain weather is in effect, recovers 1/16th max Hit Points at the end of the turn.

Name: Receiver
Description: The Pokémon copies the Ability of a defeated ally.

Name: Reckless
Description: The power of moves that have recoil damage is increased by 20%.

Name: Refrigerate
Description: Increases the power of Normal-type moves by 20%. It then changes those moves to Ice-type.

Name: Regenerator
Description: When the Pokémon switches out of battle, up to 33.3% of its maximum Hit Points are restored

Name: Ripen
Description: Ripens Berries and doubles their effect.

Name: Rivalry
Description: Attack & Special Attack is increased by 25% if the foe is of the same gender; Attack & Special Attack is decreased by 25% if the foe is of the opposite gender.

Name: Rock Head
Description: Does not receive recoil damage from recoil-causing damages.

Name: Rough Skin
Description: The opponent is hurt by 1/8th of his maxium Hit Points of recoil when using an attack, that requires physical contact, against this Pokémon.

Name: Sand Force
Description: Ground-type, Rock-type & Steel-type moves have their power increased by 30% in a Sandstorm and will not receive damage

Name: Sand Rush
Description: Speed is doubled within a sandstorm

Name: Sand Spit
Description: The Pokémon creates a sandstorm when it's hit by an attack.

Name: Sand Stream
Description: Sandstorm blows when the Pokémon enters battle. As of X & Y, this lasts 5 turns.

Name: Sand Veil
Description: Raises the Pokémon’s evasion during a sandstorm by one level. Overworld Effect: If the Pokémon is in the lead spot, chance of encountering a wild Pokémon during a sandstorm decreases to 50%. This does not work in Pokémon Sword & Shield onwards

Name: Sap Sipper
Description: Attack is raised by one stage when the Pokémon is hit by a Grass-type move. User receives no damage from Grass-type attacks.

Name: Scrappy
Description: Allows the Pokémon to hit Ghost-type Pokémon with Normal-type and Fighting-type moves. Blocks Intimidate

Name: Screen Cleaner
Description: When the Pokémon enters a battle, the effects of Light Screen, Reflect, and Aurora Veil are nullified for both opposing and ally Pokémon.

Name: Shadow Tag
Description: The opponent cannot run nor switch while this Pokémon is in play. The opponent may still switch by using Baton Pass, U-turn or Volt Switch, if it is holding a Shed Shell or is a Ghost-type.

Name: Sharpness
Description: Increases the power of Slicing moves used by this Pokémon by 50%

Name: Shed Skin
Description: Every turn, it has a 1 in 3 chance of healing from a status condition (BURN, PARALYZE, SLEEP, POISON, FREEZE).

Name: Sheer Force
Description: Moves with a secondary effect are increased in power by 30% but lose their secondary effect

Name: Shell Armor
Description: Opponent’s moves cannot Critical Hit.

Name: Shield Dust
Description: Damaging moves used by the opponent will not have an additional effect.

Name: Skill Link
Description: Moves that attack 2-5 times always hit 5 times.

Name: Slush Rush
Description: Doubles the Pokémon's Speed when Snow is in effect

Name: Sniper
Description: Power of critical-hit moves is increased to 225% rather than 150%.

Name: Snow Cloak
Description: Raises the Pokémon’s evasion during a Snowstorm by one level. Overworld Effect: If the Pokémon is in the lead spot, chance of encountering a wild Pokémon during a Snowstorm decreases to 50%.

Name: Snow Warning
Description: Snowstorm blows when the Pokémon enters battle. As of X & Y, this lasts 5 turns.

Name: Solar Power
Description: During sunshine, the Pokémon’s Special Attack raises to 1.5 times but HP decreases by 1/8th the maximum HP every turn.

Name: Solid Rock
Description: Damage by super-effective moves is reduced by 25%.

Name: Soundproof
Description: Unaffected by sound moves. If this Pokémon switches out with Baton Pass, Perish Song against the switched out will not be nullified.

Name: Speed Boost
Description: Speed increases by one stage at the end of each turn.

Name: Spicy Spray
Description: When the Pokémon takes damage from a move, it burns the attacker.

Name: Stall
Description: The Pokémon always attacks last.

Name: Stalwart
Description: Ignores the effects of opposing Pokémon's Abilities and moves that draw in moves.

Name: Stamina
Description: Boosts the Defense stat when hit by an attack.

Name: Stance Change
Description: The Pokémon changes its form to Blade Forme when it uses an attack move, and changes to Shield Forme when it uses King's Shield.

Name: Static
Description: The opponent has a 30% chance of being induced with PARALYZE when using an attack, that requires physical contact, against this Pokémon. Overworld Effect: If the Pokémon is in the lead spot, chance of encountering an Electric-type wild Pokémon increases severely.

Name: Steadfast
Description: Speed raises by one level every time the Pokémon flinches.

Name: Stench
Description: If the Pokémon uses a move that deals damage on the opponent, there is a chance the opponent flinches Overworld Effect: If the Pokémon is in the lead spot, chance of encountering a wild Pokémon decreases to 50%. In Pokémon Sword & Shield this reduces to 12.5%. This doesn't work in Pokémon Scarlet & Violet onwards

Name: Sticky Hold
Description: This Pokémon’s item cannot be taken. Overworld Effect: If the Pokémon is in the lead spot, when fishing, Pokémon are easier to catch.

Name: Strong Jaw
Description: Increases the power of biting moves by 50%

Name: Sturdy
Description: The Pokémon will remain with 1 HP if it was going to be knocked out by a move when at full Hit Points, and it is immune to One Hit KO moves.

Name: Super Luck
Description: Raises the critical-hit ratio of moves by one level. Overworld Effect: If the Pokémon is in the lead spot, chance of encountering a wild Pokémon holding an item increases.

Name: Supersweet Syrup
Description: Lowers the evasion of opposing Pokémon by 1 stage when first sent into battle

Name: Supreme Overlord
Description: When the Pokémon enters a battle, its Attack and Sp. Atk stats are boosted by 10% for each of the allies in its party that have already been defeated.

Name: Surge Surfer
Description: Doubles the Pokémon's Speed stat on Electric Terrain.

Name: Swarm
Description: When HP is below 1/3rd its maximum, power of Bug-type moves is increased by 50%. Overworld Effect: While travelling, the roar of common wild Pokémon can be heard more often if the Pokémon is in the lead spot.

Name: Sweet Veil
Description: Prevents itself and ally Pokémon from falling asleep.

Name: Swift Swim
Description: When rainy, The Pokémon’s Speed doubles.

Name: Symbiosis
Description: Passes the Pokémon's hold item to its adjacent ally when that ally consumes its hold item

Name: Synchronize
Description: When this Pokémon becomes Poisoned, Paralyzed, or Burned, so does the opponent. However, Fire-type and Water Veil ability Pokémon cannot be Burned, Poison-type and Steel-type and Immunity ability Pokémon cannot be Poisoned, and Limber ability Pokémon cannot be Paralyzed.

Name: Tangled Feet
Description: Pokémon’s evasion raises one level when Confused.

Name: Technician
Description: Moves with a base power of 60 or less are boosted in power by 50%

Name: Telepathy
Description: Prevents damage from team-mates during Double battles

Name: Thick Fat
Description: Fire and Ice-type moves deal 50% damage.

Name: Torrent
Description: When HP is below 1/3rd its maximum, power of Water-type moves is increased by 50%.

Name: Tough Claws
Description: Increases the power of moves that make physical contact by 30%

Name: Toxic Debris
Description: Scatters poison spikes at the feet of the opposing team when the Pokémon takes damage from physical moves.

Name: Trace
Description: Ability becomes the same as that of the opponent. Switching this Pokémon out of battle restores its original ability. In a Double Battle, a random opponent’s ability will be copied.

Name: Unaware
Description: Foe’s stat modifications are ignored.

Name: Unburden
Description: Speed is doubled once the held item is consumed.

Name: Unnerve
Description: The opponent Pokémon will never use their held Berry while the Pokémon is in battle.

Name: Unseen Fist
Description: The Pokémon can deal damage with moves that make physical contact, even if the target is protected.

Name: Vital Spirit
Description: The Pokémon cannot be Asleep while having this ability. Overworld Effect: If the Pokémon is in the lead spot, chance of encountering a high level wild Pokémon increases by 50%. In Pokémon Sword & Shield, this only works on Random encounters. This doesn't work in Pokémon Scarlet & Violet onwards

Name: Volt Absorb
Description: The Pokémon heals up to 1/4 of its maximum Hit Points when hit with Electric-type moves.

Name: Wandering Spirit
Description: The Pokémon exchanges Abilities with a Pokémon that hits it with a move that makes direct contact.

Name: Water Absorb
Description: The Pokémon heals up to 1/4 of its maximum Hit Points when hit with Water-type moves.

Name: Water Bubble
Description: Decreases Fire-type move power on the Pokémon by 50%. Increases power of Water-type moves used by the Pokémon by 100% before adding STAB. Prevents Burn

Name: Weak Armor
Description: When hit by an attack, the Pokémon's Defense is lowered by one stage but Speed is increased by two stages.

Name: White Smoke
Description: Opponents’ moves which lower this Pokémon’s stats have no effect. However this Pokémon may lower its own stats with its own moves. Overworld Effect: If the Pokémon is in the lead spot, chance of encountering a wild Pokémon decreases to 50%.

Name: Zero to Hero
Description: The Pokémon transforms into its Hero Form when it switches out.
